calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Scott Hughes, #12365.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, was and is a federally chartered banking institution.
No appearance by defendants Tayed Alhafez, a/k/a Tayel A. Hafez, a/k/a Tayeb M. Al Hafez, a/k/a MHD Tayeb Alhafez, an individual, or Unity Company, an entity.
Amended Defaults were entered against defendants on July 6, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, was and is a federally chartered banking institution, and against the Defaulted Defendants Tayed Alhafez, a/k/a Tayel A. Hafez, a/k/a Tayeb M. Al Hafez, a/k/a MHD Tayeb Alhafez, an individual, and Unity Company, an entity as follows:

Damages/Principal - $70,201.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $480.00.

Total - $70,681.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
